briefdescription.para: CBOR item type as seen by the reader.

detaileddescription.para: Returned by syn_cbor_peek_type() before consuming an item.

briefdescription.para: Return the type of the next item without consuming it.

simplesect.para: Item type, or SYN_CBOR_ERROR on buffer underrun.

briefdescription.para: Skip the next complete item (including nested contents).

detaileddescription.para: Handles nested arrays and maps up to 8 levels deep.

briefdescription.para: Consume a map header; return the number of key-value pairs.
Consume an array header; return the number of items.
Read a signed integer (major type 0 or 1).
Read a float32 value (major type 7, info=26).
Read a boolean (major type 7, info 20 or 21).

simplesect.para: Decoded value, or false on error.

briefdescription.para: Consume a null item (major type 7, info=22).
Read a text string into a caller-provided buffer.

detaileddescription.para: Copies at most cap-1 bytes and null-terminates. The CBOR item is fully consumed regardless of buffer capacity.

parameterdescription.para: Output buffer capacity (including space for null terminator).

simplesect.para: Actual UTF-8 byte count in the CBOR item (may exceed cap-1).

briefdescription.para: Read a byte string into a caller-provided buffer.

detaileddescription.para: Copies at most cap bytes. The CBOR item is fully consumed.

simplesect.para: Actual byte count in the CBOR item (may exceed cap).

briefdescription.para: Return true if no decode error has occurred.
Return true when all bytes have been consumed.
CBOR decoder — zero-alloc, streaming read from a byte buffer.

detaileddescription.para: Walks a CBOR-encoded buffer sequentially. Caller peeks the type of the next item, then calls the matching read function. Reading the wrong type sets the error flag and returns a zero/empty value.
